college_info.college_name: Audisankara Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Audisankara Group of Institutions, is located in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh. Established in 2001, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. Audisankara Group of Institutions provides 40 UG, PG and After 10th courses in 11 specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA are some of the courses offered at Audisankara Group of Institutions. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The total fee at Audisankara Group of Institutions ranges between INR 54,000 to 2,44,400. The average median package at Audisankara Group of Institutions is INR 3,66,733. Audisankara Group of Institutions offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: For better placement and infrastructure, join Audisankara Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Above 50% of students were placed in Audisankara. The lowest package was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Wipro and Accenture were very interested in taking students from college placements, and many students got internship opportunities in this college. Many roles were offered, like software development, web development, testing, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good in this college, and the libraries were well-maintained. Coming to the labs, they were not working properly in some sections. Hostels were good and safe. There were medical facilities in this college, which provided games and sports opportunities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence ) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is overall good, but the hostel needs some improvement.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. Placements are very good in our super seniors batch, but after that, the placement rate is not that good. The highest package offered was around 8 LPA, and the average package is 4.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are IBM, TCS, Cognizant, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my branch, the lab equipment is okay, and the library is peaceful & well-stocked. We have 2 to 3 grounds for cricket, basketball, and indoor games equipment. Coming to the hostel, the hostel food is too bad, and no proper ventilation in the rooms. Otherwise, it's good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am very happy to join this college, this is one of the platforms to grow in future.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of the students from our previous batch got placed through campus placements, mainly because of the strong support provided by the placement cell. The highest package offered was 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.4 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies for our course were TCS, Wipro, Deloitte and Amazon.
review_content.Infrastructure: Compared to nearby colleges, our college has very good infrastructure and facilities. For example, every department has separate computer labs with good equipment. There are two libraries, one in the college and another in the hostel. By the way, the hostel also has all the necessary facilities, but the food is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are really excellent. Placement cell takes special care of students and puts in a lot of effort during placement time, and they conduct daily extra classes for placements. Because of their efforts, many students get placed in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: From my point of view, our college provides all the necessary facilities and infrastructure. Recently, the systems have been upgraded in the labs. Wi-Fi is available inside the hostel, but it doesn't work inside the college. Our campus looks very beautiful with lots of trees.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, we have enjoyment along with studies.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students are placed from our course. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the average package is 4.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, IBM, Wipro, and so on. Nearly 60% of students got an internship, mostly in IT companies like TCS, Infosys, and startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure and facilities are average, Wi-Fi is available, but it doesn't work properly, and the systems in the labs are outdated. Classrooms are neat and clean. Each classroom can accommodate 70 students. We have separate sports classes with coaches to train us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Positive experience with college and students.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a very strong placement track record. Our placement cell regularly organizes training programs in coding, aptitude, and software skills. The placement rate is about 76%, and companies such as Siemens, Accenture, and Cognizant offer good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in my college are quite good. Our management provides all the basic facilities that students need, like Wi-Fi, computer labs, seminar halls, library, etc. The college hostel is the worst, so I prefer traveling daily by college buses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Audisankara Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: For better placement and infrastructure, join Audisankara Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good in this college, and the libraries were well-maintained. Coming to the labs, they were not working properly in some sections. Hostels were good and safe. There were medical facilities in this college, which provided games and sports opportunities to the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 8 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is overall good, but the hostel needs some improvement.
reviews.review_text: In my branch, the lab equipment is okay, and the library is peaceful & well-stocked. We have 2 to 3 grounds for cricket, basketball, and indoor games equipment. Coming to the hostel, the hostel food is too bad, and no proper ventilation in the rooms. Otherwise, it's good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very happy to join this college, this is one of the platforms to grow in future.
reviews.review_text: Compared to nearby colleges, our college has very good infrastructure and facilities. For example, every department has separate computer labs with good equipment. There are two libraries, one in the college and another in the hostel. By the way, the hostel also has all the necessary facilities, but the food is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_text: From my point of view, our college provides all the necessary facilities and infrastructure. Recently, the systems have been upgraded in the labs. Wi-Fi is available inside the hostel, but it doesn't work inside the college. Our campus looks very beautiful with lots of trees.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 9 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In our college, we have enjoyment along with studies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure and facilities are average, Wi-Fi is available, but it doesn't work properly, and the systems in the labs are outdated. Classrooms are neat and clean. Each classroom can accommodate 70 students. We have separate sports classes with coaches to train us.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Positive experience with college and students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in my college are quite good. Our management provides all the basic facilities that students need, like Wi-Fi, computer labs, seminar halls, library, etc. The college hostel is the worst, so I prefer traveling daily by college buses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college gives students a lot of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college seems like old, but it looks very beautiful and pleasant. Our college management has also provided bus facilities for students. Hostel facility is also available outside the campus, but I don't like hostel food and facilities. Otherwise, all is okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Student-friendly environment with balanced academics and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well furnished with proper facilities. Apart from academics, the college also gives importance to sports and extracurricular activities, and various games are organized on campus, and our teams participate in intercollege tournaments. The hostel food is not very good; we have to compromise, but the hostel also has a library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with better teaching standards and a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: My college is very beautiful and has everything that students need. The facilities in the boys' hostel are not good. For health needs, the campus has a small medical room with a majority of nurses, and they provide tables. In case of an emergency, there is a hospital on the nearby campus as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 9 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It provides a good future for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities in our department, such as a transport facility, parking facility, and sports grounds. Whatever facilities students need, they provide them. It provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 3 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is fine, but the placements need some improvement.
reviews.review_text: My college has good facilities and infrastructure. A statue of Saraswati Devi is located at the center of the campus. To prevent ragging, juniors and seniors are housed in separate buildings. The college also has two large grounds for sports, an open-space auditorium, and a convention hall for organizing small festivals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A place to learn and grow with some challenges.
reviews.review_text: Audisankara College provides decent infrastructure for students. Hostel rooms are shared and come with basic furniture like beds, tables, and wardrobes. Attached bathrooms and generator backup are available. The college also includes a canteen, gym, playgrounds, medical room, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a good future for its students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities. The girls' hostel is located inside the campus, while the boys' hostel is outside the campus. Rooms come with basic furniture and attached bathrooms. Food is provided in the hostel, but it doesn't taste good. We just adjust and eat it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good choice for academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is too good in our department. Especially in the CSE and ECE departments, labs have decent equipment and computer systems. Canteen food is average, not very tasty but okay. Mess food follows a regular South Indian menu, but the quality can sometimes be inconsistent. They provide snacks in the evening at the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Audisankara College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a strong academic environment along with excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over around 26 acres featuring separate blocks for Diploma, B.Tech, MBA, and MCA. It has a large and well-designed auditorium for cultural events and college functions. There is a modern seminar hall for workshops and presentations. It also has a visitor lounge for guests.

admission_process.title: Institute of Pharmacy, Sitapur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Institute of Pharmacy, Sitapur admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in stream includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Institute of Pharmacy, Sitapuradmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCUET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,53,200for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

courses_data.name: Institute of Pharmacy, Sitapur B.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Institute of Pharmacy, Sitapur B.Pharmais offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.Pharma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 4 years programme.
